expected.notes: Snkrdunk's bg-removed product thumbnail for the MEGA アビスアイ booster box. The crawler hashes this exact image into card_image_fingerprints, so any future user photo of the same box should hit the perceptual-hash fast path with Hamming ≤ 5. Title intentionally lax (title_contains_any) because the printed name on the box front varies between product-line phrase ("強化拡張パック"), katakana set name ("メガアビスアイ"), Roman+katakana form ("MEGA アビスアイ"), and the full product line.
